title: Pusheen Pals
description: Add adorable Pusheen-themed items, mobs, blocks, and recipes to Minecraft. Craft cute decor, discover fun interactions, and bring cozy, wholesome Pusheen vibes into your world.
body:
![Pusheen pals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0329e47e8c4bf177a3bb47cd05cafb327835a138_0.webp) [![Fabric](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/unsupported/fabric_vector.svg)](https://fabricmc.net) [![Forge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/unsupported/forge_vector.svg)](https://files.minecraftforge.net) [![Quilt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/unsupported/quilt_vector.svg)](https://quiltmc.org) [![Discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://dc.gg/devvyyxyz) [![CurseForge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pusheen-pals) [![Modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/pusheen-pals)
![Overview](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devvyyxyz/abc-site@main/assets/images/titles/Overview.png) Add adorable Pusheen-themed items, mobs, blocks, and recipes to Minecraft. Craft cute decor, discover fun interactions, and bring cosy, wholesome Pusheen vibes into your world. ![Features](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devvyyxyz/abc-site@main/assets/images/titles/Features.png) - Pusheen plushies - Pusheen-related foods (from the comics, like bread!) - Villager trading - Friendly tameable Pusheens ![Screenshots](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devvyyxyz/abc-site@main/assets/images/titles/Screenshots.png) ![Pusheen plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bIOZbZXC/images/c46522f1f5f443b73a266fd68f1cc8d70166832d_350.webp) ![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9f15785d88cf0c117a6cd5bff405e2cc865eadc.png) ![Compatibility](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devvyyxyz/abc-site@main/assets/images/titles/Compatibility.png) - Minecraft versions: - Mod loaders (~~Fabric~~ / ~~Forge~~ / NeoForge / Quilt): - Works with most mods unless otherwise stated ![Q&A](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devvyyxyz/abc-site@main/assets/images/titles/Q&A.png)
How do I craft a Pusheen plushie?
Right now, you can only obtain in creative
![Roadmap](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devvyyxyz/abc-site@main/assets/images/titles/Roadmap.png) This roadmap is split into **versioned milestones**. Each milestone maps directly to a **Modrinth release version**. > Modrinth links are included where applicable > Future links are **commented out** until releases exist ---
Core Pusheen Content **Modrinth Release:** [View v1.0 on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/pusheen-pals/version/1.0.0) > Current content: **Pusheen Plushie** | Feature | Description | Status | |--------|-------------|--------| | Pusheen Plushie | Placeable decorative plush block. | Added | | Pusheen Food Items | Pusheen Cookies, Strawberry Milk, Macaron Bites, Choco Doughnuts. | Partially added | | Collectables | Plushies, figurines, posters, trading cards. | Partially added | | Pusheen Mob | Friendly passive mob with idle behaviours. | Planned | | Crafting Recipes | Recipes using Soft Yarn and Pastel Fabric. | Planned | | Advancements | Early-game themed advancements. | Planned |
---
Decoration & Interaction | Feature | Description | Status | |--------|-------------|--------| | Furniture Set | Chairs, tables, beds, lamps, shelves. | Planned | | Decorative Blocks | Wallpaper, rugs, plush piles, pastel lighting. | Planned | | Animated Blocks | Subtle idle animations. | Planned | | Interaction System | Pet, feed, and pose Pusheen mobs. | Planned | | Particle Effects | Hearts, sparkles, pastel dust. | Planned |
---
World Integration | Feature | Description | Status | |--------|-------------|--------| | Pusheen Biome | Pastel biome with custom grass and ambience. | Planned | | Structures | Cafés, bedrooms, gift shops. | Planned | | Loot Tables | Pusheen-themed loot in structures. | Planned | | Ambient Audio | Biome-specific background sounds. | Planned |
---
Villagers & Economy | Feature | Description | Status | |--------|-------------|--------| | Pusheen Merchant | New villager profession. | Planned | | Trade Pool | Plushies, food, decor, rare collectables. | Planned | | Trade Progression | Unlock higher-tier trades over time. | Planned |
---
Technical & Compatibility | Feature | Description | Status | |--------|-------------|--------| | Config Options | Toggle mobs, biomes, sounds, recipes. | Planned | | Balance Tweaks | Spawn rates and crafting costs. | Planned | | Mod Compatibility | Works alongside popular mods and modpacks. | Added | | Performance Optimisation | Server-friendly behaviour. | Planned |
---
Long-Term & Experimental Ideas - Seasonal events (Birthday Pusheen, Winter Pusheen) - Wearable cosmetics (hats, backpacks) - Photo/pose mode with UI - Server-friendly plush display blocks - Optional enhanced visuals resource pack
![Limitations](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devvyyxyz/abc-site@main/assets/images/titles/Limitations.png) - Only available in creative ![Credits](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devvyyxyz/abc-site@main/assets/images/titles/Credits.png) - [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) - Used public JEI API library - [Pusheen](https://pusheen.com/) - Creator of Pusheen's website
